things.name: Walt Disney World Resort
things.description: The world's most visited theme park resort — Magic Kingdom, EPCOT, Hollywood Studios and Animal Kingdom

things.name: Universal Studios Florida
things.description: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter, Epic Universe (2025) and Hollywood movie-themed rides

things.name: Kennedy Space Center
things.description: Tour the launch pads, see a Space Shuttle and watch a live rocket launch — 60 km east of Orlando

things.name: SeaWorld Orlando
things.description: Marine life shows, roller coasters over the lagoon and the Manta ray feeding experience

things.name: ICON Park
things.description: International Drive entertainment complex — the giant ICON Orlando 400 observation wheel and Madame Tussauds

things.name: Wekiwa Springs State Park
things.description: Natural spring swimming hole with crystal-clear 68°F water — kayaking and wildlife viewing year-round

things.name: Disney Springs
things.description: Disney's free outdoor shopping, dining and entertainment complex — the T-Rex restaurant is unforgettable

things.name: Gatorland
things.description: The Alligator Capital of the World — 2,000 alligators and crocodiles, zipline over them and wrestle shows

things.name: Premium Outlet Shopping
things.description: Orlando Premium Outlets on International Drive — tax-free shopping at 180 luxury and designer brand stores

things.name: Busch Gardens Tampa Day Trip
things.description: African safari theme park 90 minutes west — Serengeti Express train and Cheetah Hunt roller coaster
